| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0782d8b2b0e24f0093bc7944a763aebf&_e=xHhm6KnWWN9lxiMW3G2Two51nZjcCk0Vgdl0lrMzGlgL1oSFq1zHH2KcWFbxAyRNXO2u3hFeYETZw5oiJols2zW84An0IHWZePi6tqGfjibB1G0L6_keFeqXmZ8KYyykwNhX7vkysayzBN0aEljv1XW_SZykkTya1D7tjoxK7WTjx9n22G-amSrjXWIwlBnOwa7tu_HpdkQwyUdXKarkERraTVK6sjsXoER8mbuhdWoqH6A96kgufgRaiwXgFi6H1E-VQnqtKArEXlzTzy_PXpnEFyzdYdwWJVSzl5qd5kVGEUaUzaERYfD4fKb-4bZvvHvgBhi5WEsY7nOBTfmIA5qQv2NJNbCceUze6czwfLeXCyegPPGZ7iV77CtUUiRUWge4pBnMUi-ilTsfXgyx0qUzacvuG4XZ0CfaWlshqVY%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0782d8b2b0e24f0093bc7944a763aebf&_e=xHhm6KnWWN9lxiMW3G2Two51nZjcCk0Vgdl0lrMzGlgL1oSFq1zHH2KcWFbxAyRNXO2u3hFeYETZw5oiJols2zW84An0IHWZePi6tqGfjibB1G0L6_keFeqXmZ8KYyykwNhX7vkysayzBN0aEljv1XW_SZykkTya1D7tjoxK7WTjx9n22G-amSrjXWIwlBnOwa7tu_HpdkQwyUdXKarkERraTVK6sjsXoER8mbuhdWoqH6A96kgufgRaiwXgFi6H1E-VQnqtKArEXlzTzy_PXgzNYOrm2GgrQ6lpVYET7t5MrK3aMwFN3Lyp9gT6L1MANqsN9yspw123SRQ4Ji4FKSJqymN0xZoeY9-OImmLcwCIHEkvLkC1ANJYqO350zBqcOj_8Suu2FbcV-I0jWqcqdvhiFt2A1Lhvu7aVEcStB8%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0782d8b2b0e24f0093bc7944a763aebf&_e=xHhm6KnWWN9lxiMW3G2Two51nZjcCk0Vgdl0lrMzGlgL1oSFq1zHH2KcWFbxAyRNXO2u3hFeYETZw5oiJols2zW84An0IHWZePi6tqGfjibB1G0L6_keFeqXmZ8KYyykwNhX7vkysayzBN0aEljv1XW_SZykkTya1D7tjoxK7WTjx9n22G-amSrjXWIwlBnOwa7tu_HpdkQwyUdXKarkERraTVK6sjsXoER8mbuhdWoqH6A96kgufgRaiwXgFi6H1E-VQnqtKArEXlzTzy_PXgdfE_WzoU8FqtUzFC91HWHd_ktk17tY3WigvJamVtBiY1J98hCMCuU9u75qNmq2eJiyvNF2aX2m3SgdZO46JlOnTsUsiHmKxyrwSTixikV30PhZ51kuO-iE4C-SjKVXrpvpJY8g5NQt_-wIpPhe1VA%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: PhD: “Future of dollar in one shocking chart”
body:
If, like millions of Americans, you're awake-at-night concerned about the status of the dollar...

| Dear Reader, If, like millions of Americans, you're awake-at-night concerned about the status of the dollar... Take a look at this chart. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8067da773d1c48c8a5543f5704710204&_e=rjEKX4ofwSJ6vDNlfqFT4oV9NQclAc9rRl-kIN6kccsWjCICwpfObI7GefZwOHlk-h7ogYSH0bLw5l4XEnOpXNhatLE8k-XUGPBKUHxmkQYRUb2KZJrmckZF-V3_bLc2v5of_9uwFaxQGbfuzaz_In0cyVASMMdYET4OvGl_mHScvKTvTFgF0l4dUR4TEQlZ-P4hTmURc7wnKJLl7xi_EeMagzoQgWCZNQZi5Nkniq4QIwcjwfuVM0mRZ2Ud1unwVWpzbYeIARM1F2EFbsnqZNRmLz2RH5tgBSSwPML_fas%3D) What do you see? Most folks simply see a stock falling from $20 to $1... But there's something much deeper going on here. You see - this firm's CEO recently stepped down after issuing a major warning about our currency. According to his research, demand for his firm's product has plummeted to a 20-year low... And Dr. Nomi Prins is convinced this crisis will develop in a shocking way in the days ahead, as a major currency crisis strikes America's financial system. Dr. Prins says:
> "This company could go bankrupt along with many others due to a complete overhaul we're about to see to our financial system. In other words, our money is about to change forever... and it's set to happen in just a few weeks."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8067da773d1c48c8a5543f5704710204&_e=rjEKX4ofwSJ6vDNlfqFT4oV9NQclAc9rRl-kIN6kccsWjCICwpfObI7GefZwOHlk-h7ogYSH0bLw5l4XEnOpXNhatLE8k-XUGPBKUHxmkQYRUb2KZJrmckZF-V3_bLc2v5of_9uwFaxQGbfuzaz_IhqLt8yrs4G3VYr15L6FAH_a4YAjY4dJPYglOPcmyEySUJ5vL8TPb7CTfc_rrp0fa8TocLWNImSjQiGSiY3ZQzlcGfAtXsLXBMaaDLYTLgcNkkyTyzUSzxd_v0pouJu019O0KTkvfq9xKKWJX8_Lw9w%3D) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar change to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who acted quickly beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8067da773d1c48c8a5543f5704710204&_e=rjEKX4ofwSJ6vDNlfqFT4oV9NQclAc9rRl-kIN6kccsWjCICwpfObI7GefZwOHlk-h7ogYSH0bLw5l4XEnOpXNhatLE8k-XUGPBKUHxmkQYRUb2KZJrmckZF-V3_bLc2v5of_9uwFaxQGbfuzaz_IrtOnC8gGwSzo0dohvsbESVMOKgLRAj9VQ2GZAAE2AsXckd7CYhIwax2hYBIwIacmeFdpHQQhjH-C6jHGDxV-vJOcn1PoP42G_l7lwS0xTw4eT8QLHhj6H2ICwS0ogISd3DFDhAL3sfvmuakUXq-nVU%3D)

name: Read/Act News
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | |
---
| | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American,Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://trk.readactnews.).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only.**The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION—to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country.**

That is why I’m writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”—before it’s too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic—knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://trk.readactnews.-Q)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxODMtYjRjNjI2N2Q5MjRiNDA0YjkwYzQ5NDJjMTljZjVjMDEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/RRs39sG5uKL8EeaGD0L2sQ) to unsubscribe.

| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdKWQfZXhzjJsJJss3eapS7QjOcD1o56vy3Afg4TSXKG9F9QimVhtCPsNI5DcMJMdEijEPAUUekWXU1zDOAYZhNdT-0vKEIsDCiYgBelX_z6HFx3C8GBKbI_LXd_NwmFZZ2H7Nsyt1jMJPf1fjQfvnUZsdxtkuhehUJYpSKnSqYXmi36eW0fwpXyXvwFtrdbt-_WA9fRDPXU_tZSH5mNwkyT13V11CC3HgPVy9AWQxpWgENZ89ZN7x97rCeBux6ka3pUFBw9RhZyJgaObTrifdcku608XEGuIzP9GOIWKi3Wc_CpeBUIMlJNLa4qSRhNht-idEYTMfdRc4gIHhGtjEbCUH05jmwiJViiqdzxRwXn6n3MPGLgy7d3w1taxJhIAI1bVLeOvJxKratmYAAaxYnaT5lupWd7rtl2PsftdZYEdtTPS1DzJsr76rImqmceikk/3xj/NNrlFFYVRYea73cmxop0lw/h0/BkdHC-xCf2Tare0ify204u-6SLG5d6IDtZxYYbhmvvY)
---
1️⃣ **_Wisconsin:_ Republicans cut university funding over DEI programs**
In Wisconsin, GOP lawmakers voted to cut the University of Wisconsin System’s budget by [**$32 million due to anger over the system’s diversity, equity, and inclusion programming →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXZvtuRRJPBC8SxyjCDWTobixEMDB_HV_C7rF7itZZ4lZzOFCDIp3FsU26OZJvL0OHXQ-ABuFesq0Jvanrp5DeORLCw-FS-5XGjJ-aJPdvhuZsIMvA8dwyu36MyzV2uBNIQavSZtwjwfRMHTbXKt4xYXrb72aX21V9qjcqlMUCjHBgr25t6JI2arWRE-1YUahkhyS_GP1NxdsXmkAWByVuHJkQcpDRaMvgOikEv4lt1Jz1JaAbvaQQ7_0D9YYXIoDPRk4W-RdpVyNwBJIqqg9I1o-VFTH-wrtTtVDjtViQFN0-dwRYTr4OSiiqr2RwmnU-iw-OKO_40STplGPoWDbpXqhoA0FD-C0mUHoT4vM9s_969EPUj63NOFHrNueHbqe-Srfj33RbmAge1JJsFY7XATjEAYh9onnn6YUztQaMK1z9etupMKyQwGrQukndHf4nz1WPbsYRDT3okGJTyZyboRqcTWFD97md3JA8QQJBsPXueb_t5xiUyn6NtPRjFPnIYI4NxkGN7eoSiPVEze4FLa5hgblcFWM9zE5DJQYjpEbUhgNJZbFLZoMEdQtvRqiwqm7E9xxxghp0su2IsVrpNw9NmjcE1CJ1c99Qz8Cm9lJRe_RaP1tvsiN2pl2Hu9t-pBAKt71P8diOefbr-6kY40fyPlI5fm-yHWL6ND_AdPNFWJC4kEJdUQarHuC4nyMi30VeNGy-pjTjBN-gfgf9cFzR8ZQoqKi8tlV1smy0ELBeF2W3CMGEyEl1UXChKWTZwLwFWbGKAEv6bWbU_6yF6w/3xj/NNrlFFYVRYea73cmxop0lw/h1/lOxMudz9N4NsjkB7_WaIQN4HS4CJ8RZB5GBfOZ2NJI0)
2️⃣ **_Maine:_ Senate Democrats pass paid family and medical leave**
In Maine, Democrats passed a proposal to create a paid family and medical leave policy. [**The bill will head to the House for a vote →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jcgCGgV6qMOwOymNySWy0_ey92tKDXCuk4KH1prJC8zLRYkchrDJlfJSwi6eJi4N1wq3y1wWtKqdocSvGoBoHeIfexQxpd1lJw9J5IP6hkyEoA2dAxJPjQTpm6h5--0RtjKXFGwiS1PRGwDqKvPti06jH5RTjRw8NmjlvjQ9C01ry8RjyjpJtODLmVBgXCHMYjt0B11F8VvfmpiRf3r8X7dT-OI8Z9fCMAOxuBHhTCZFVFrL5bIETYPOXMk1RtEa9RRcVssCLL2nJlqZzlPAjjBJ1N6NvuGX19QhQPfecGNRVO_gqErjm182QGVfh0m9x4B_wBvu1J7d-PumW-gjpqdDIWc0BNk_kIi-rosXstw4hadXYJNtkGN3JA_YwWk72OvoUqdx3Nv4G8rKk2Ak8IHVY13HDjk-0-0stduHLLXruqrIJv43UsQswXY77zbr-UjoZHqnfPIEn3WG7DfxjR0E4OAvqI8QagCy9eGFHWMP15RpzEDnWYeJWvHD1FH79pCSNx_ka6zB3aaN-F41FWZ-_SAck3cu34PB5apDmJFmAAnsRY35_Ki49M_PKWR2ooa_cUIZ40SWtI1ZVIvS4IFQt3woEvebgj4YXqAhetbdSU8AnsxwU3bSkspStovbDqVo2aJERlD2BTIImiwGoqJ_NOjGvEgqkLHSBfRVwZgh/3xj/NNrlFFYVRYea73cmxop0lw/h2/YWY3hzKK5id39ZhcSghvSAbzb2q3jqnV3IgaUEADAmQ)
3️⃣ **_Pennsylvania:_ Democrats vote to increase the state's minimum wage**
In Pennsylvania, House Democrats voted to increase the state's minimum wage from $7.25 to $15 by the year 2026. [**The bill now heads to the state Senate →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXXVQlnwcUD54k4JmEfxtHbT_GrdHmZu_XvsZrmDlSCI_SA0IpiGBPuyZqQeOFyC0bN6p0TghQ8GKxhWJvzwb7ilGwfMTnutQdmRNaDG3ZW8iedwCooFkhP2vNSCKyXn5znaElJQh2iyzvEBUuXEIYe8yT0Q1bzrgIF59AnaIXZ_FHsHpzS9W-MaOOvYKy9_fbiz0lnG2cZixS2R0X4_aT_1GSRLTSi1x2iGeQX7wF6bX3IU56ha06U34QdkR8uS7_9ojYmhqHMDyoF_iBXuFbxePu-Z3QXEM6BKpSvqXjP7jgIgj2AeNQQpzb0HYPZK-ksjn_xv5xF4DLUptenvwqXkmXFBsenABseiHSYW-bxewvoMr_V6eMxaKoRTGRuS6QLpZjwfXadU4UD6ip09p0mfYpfooB_vL8UAIGj_O9K5UdEvVezLfpt9aYz6lX045z2vuhTEjS_tSwNsUtcVqIbxJeQSg4JnqSruQd3NFD36GcWoSqPGGVg2M11tGg3HN_mPlb70c0uG5bqak5GkQoC4cghjgoaO4XxlrDLvXF2UzhgaGSvJyyyyu1Fu3q6HDw4ckiQJIjJLpieRIKz9rOjsu-Ar4imN1ar2AhMAvSELl/3xj/NNrlFFYVRYea73cmxop0lw/h3/Oe74xsZIo0G-EvF1QynOOcBDs8jJgZnVwxRRZx6f2w0)
4️⃣ **_Learn:_ The Supreme Court rejects fringe, Independent State Legislature Theory**
On Tuesday, SCOTUS ruled against NC Republicans in Moore v. Harper, protecting our democracy from the GOP’s attempt to give state legislatures unchecked authority over our elections. [**Read more about the ruling here →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhr_XOcJsvv4vVkTIGTP8-8sioUx6T3A_oGBQo7KibxWwlIHBLwCmnDNHjZvCVzN5JyCxdwml-HL77WiEHQmRMreKBw8IsomUDZV3q_oTvK_pQDdNuTByk9yIV65CEfmeygAPgA7GQlLV33RDVj-4ezXd0GfdOFdfWHMk3K-IG290gBuwLSL-d1Scx39bQx2Rl-YRcn3FpiEg3YRIjCgitwwtljtK6FcfAVcTxUZtjZmFGLqN5ybGRyNRzP7ecvMjraX9kATZHI85Qm8XMwZr5Aif-h4kGBmT6W1dDF22y0ThnVeyQIccUg52zrBgU1eb2GEL4Z7AmfvONaKNEuEpisMCqC7c-QpWlWjmNs0VaXJhKPILhEjGTjUZtnHQ88pnbLXMdpDrXnLPz6J7US-GE0Nla_cNO7NH6St_meP5Mdk-Oz3x9qRSEXamiF6yIwHRjgSNdltg65O7f5NFcTgPWw9Dvzpo2X76Ld43ZaGKHtFBP29ceesaCQN-SHuSSJz9wtkSK3vsrsyuPHlMRaIXq-945y5Prge13BOwhbRTP-Qebr_w-Pay3VI0qmS_IcpAhsSoaTs19NPjNBBudxuTFbI/3xj/NNrlFFYVRYea73cmxop0lw/h4/rEm-p8fNmqIcqziXyok-Thrv9iHfxxrwc1AoGBOlJ4U)
🗳️ **_Special Elections:_ Democrats prepare for upcoming races**

name: Conservatives Give
subject: WARNING: Move Your Cash Before July 26
body:
There have been a few moments that changed the course of America forever...

| Dear Reader, There have been a few moments that changed the course of America forever... JFK's assassination... 9/11... The Nixon shock of 1971... What's scheduled to take place on July 26, at 2 pm ET, could be another one of those moments. [Click here to see the details...](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9804ad3689fb47ab978ffcf799e4395f&_e=CLQuM_jkRfj7-sqJ2HPcoGpvoVbXS1_UdeWopaRj-wbkViINV3sXPCpc_f-5IvUgNpKk71KMydc0MTpW7JnCgsJvjZJLTYDVOFwjdLKLSqDxpLrQ0ZEUiscqMp2VMXbx_xOsZmUXTVIQ5WtId2PXOd_en9EakVEJNVJZD42gHEPjJBdGrCc-gA-BpUc_GowPv9TsQbprJ-frXBQeXkMH9lBs4S18GJR__aT1kvRUI94gSHen527oF0wHog8WMSG5ilRokH472fL8ukSwMxS7Vn4-vNhs7Avx9V1WgZOkc3I%3D) Because those who don't prepare could end up holding a bunch of worthless U.S. dollars. Regards, Kendall Castillo
Managing Editor, _Palm Beach Letter_

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here Hi, it’s Jen! We are just a few days away from one of my favorite holidays…the 4th of July!!! It’s really special for my husband and I for many reasons…including the fact that we got engaged on July 4th in D.C. at the base of the Washington monument! These days, one of my favorite ways to celebrate is by helping put out American flags in our local community. Nothing makes me happier than seeing all the red, white, and blue all across town!! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d941de71ff1a6319335bb3dcd450333288039dd652a6fb38089e52d2cd5cf3eed808dc6e57f25fd42998cfbc9b130de20b9939881d935da5cde779f7d3ca9021 Now I want to hear from you: how are you and your family celebrating the 4th of July this year, Peter? https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d941de71ff1a6319335bb3dcd450333288039dd652a6fb38089e52d2cd5cf3eed808dc6e57f25fd42998cfbc9b130de20b9939881d935da5cde779f7d3ca9021 SHARE YOUR ANSWER Whether it is attending one of the beautiful fireworks displays..holding a cookout in your backyard..traveling to visit family..or something else, let me know how you will be celebrating our nation’s independence. I look forward to reading your answers and taking pride in how great it is to live in the USA! -Jen Paid for by Kiggans for Congress USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. We are just a few days away from one of my favorite holidays…the 4th of July!!! It’s really special for my husband and I for many reasons…including the fact that we got engaged on July 4th in D.C. at the base of the Washington monument! These days, one of my favorite ways to celebrate is by helping put out American flags in our local community. Nothing makes me happier than seeing all the red, white, and blue all across town!! Now I want to hear from you: how are you and your family celebrating the 4th of July this year, Peter? name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Peter, will you please personally endorse Ruben Gallego today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
This is no ordinary ask
#

Peter -
We need to ask you to do something important today.
Can you add your name to say you personally endorse Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona? It's a small and simple act, but after our last FEC deadline it will speak volumes about the strength of our campaign.
If that's all you need to hear, use this link to get it done:
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/EndorseRuben**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230701_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230701-1-15&refcode2=788.734936.T6sVqo&akid=788%2E734936%2ET6sVqo)
Otherwise, here's why this is important. Please give it some thought:
Winning this race will require us to unite Democrats behind our effort, and that includes national Democrats whose endorsements matter.
Those folks are paying attention to three things: the polls, how much money we raise, and the grassroots enthusiasm for our campaign.
They don't want to be on the opposite side of a campaign that has broad grassroots appeal.
That's where these endorsements come in. When Ruben has these conversations, this is the story he is telling: the polls, the money and the grassroots support.
That starts with people like you. So please:
[**Use this link to add your name as a personal endorser of Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona. It's a small act that means a big deal to our chances.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230701_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230701-1-15&refcode2=788.734936.T6sVqo&akid=788%2E734936%2ET6sVqo)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230701_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230701-1-15&refcode2=788.734936.T6sVqo&akid=788%2E734936%2ET6sVqo)
Thank you,
Ruben Gallego for Arizona
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230701_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230701-1-15&refcode2=788.734936.T6sVqo&akid=788%2E734936%2ET6sVqo)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=788%2E734936%2ET6sVqo). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=788_734936_T6sVqo&akid=788%2E734936%2ET6sVqo)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ae687ae3c5f47ed9a4077d598323190&_e=vGTWUYgp84FtnjboA6GUQvLsgIqQstwPpcgNEykjVgb4gXX-96V1m3e_tPaJtKilZiTwPiLLuJrKayeybbo_cAye2BRwyrT-OcCKqPrxpQUTDj5qEZW8_NnE3HnxJ1wYVZINkYIVHsbmDUtF7jKaE9XKIFk7fO-M9daw6X1tuyedscfNJEJX2SUmhLWGBg1gG8M43xVfZ53NlTny6OnddBQPXImz9AG-LybB3fXijQynQVAacJuOVz8pPhlVXn6vFfFmgLrGDN44sNENF0jLDHWFurkWoK_RTPmoylm6ktJMMT-VGRoZtOHcYvIDyypoABeUL12GtuEhkRoMOsQF-PJzTOIuYXwggjqrW3B4WET8HqkfL5R601lG1v_o9_9Iooafqnyg4U0RXL4bDboxHvode7Snwkpd1eOrnpyjem4%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ae687ae3c5f47ed9a4077d598323190&_e=vGTWUYgp84FtnjboA6GUQvLsgIqQstwPpcgNEykjVgb4gXX-96V1m3e_tPaJtKilZiTwPiLLuJrKayeybbo_cAye2BRwyrT-OcCKqPrxpQUTDj5qEZW8_NnE3HnxJ1wYVZINkYIVHsbmDUtF7jKaE9XKIFk7fO-M9daw6X1tuyedscfNJEJX2SUmhLWGBg1gG8M43xVfZ53NlTny6OnddBQPXImz9AG-LybB3fXijQynQVAacJuOVz8pPhlVXn6vZuqPxd35ULNAFPI42AcqSnLeg5VyA_j8ju7p7W45k0rOKvVu-Zhl48dUTkhXyqf2hFR4kxMsrvsY5qL5ykzSR7nBkViM0Juwwtqs0-1x7VN-p6IyWFGh5FMFVcu-bfmckRI3fGMIo8A8tUYotHPQDQFzpJtE7Grce-FcUOIQ2dw%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ae687ae3c5f47ed9a4077d598323190&_e=vGTWUYgp84FtnjboA6GUQvLsgIqQstwPpcgNEykjVgb4gXX-96V1m3e_tPaJtKilZiTwPiLLuJrKayeybbo_cAye2BRwyrT-OcCKqPrxpQUTDj5qEZW8_NnE3HnxJ1wYVZINkYIVHsbmDUtF7jKaE9XKIFk7fO-M9daw6X1tuyedscfNJEJX2SUmhLWGBg1gG8M43xVfZ53NlTny6OnddBQPXImz9AG-LybB3fXijQynQVAacJuOVz8pPhlVXn6v4SDcbleDMvFrCuTofWyXyfAdJg-cgvlixZeOZ31YyoofNkhIUsy5sjAYqTKleVYGcdNYo0rxVUyy8JOj1VxsUGJ1Ja_32trHz7G00d47sPKWlaCCE80a0S2jmJkdler_5QltkOqecRlza1KgSn_mpGZtBNGztJaMAzS2l_ggXCw%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to reach and teach millions has never been more urgently needed. That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. By responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2608e450aef641529305966ae44351ce&_e=Uza9rJwhrILRbRSa9IRgxbWRY6J-YMIMZ48E-suCyR3BE9x2TDdBg_Ej_UBThZ3LLUNXnF6TtQGoy1_xT8neGzhiEATPK--rpmkxFIuOyBdy-Rm37uvqe2BoLSNst7q8bJnj0nZhIIHNcQNKfnhS6-HE4lAVGo_DnGbx6jiLovZBNZ5FJUzVPLtD58WK3oBGdtcNpnVb5NE4J2uhIj9N0Ioo5rpBNeUzvoo0jF9qRqtKqhG3IIZkodXTVtFyCotdht_bsgvPzGW6ep65oZHYJ-T6o4xSY5c0bC4nKvfix11Nlqg7AXa9GejBp3Yj5zyDvFtm87OCIK2QeieBM3owm4tfnJE3iQ6GQ-DvRmIgkKN9h-V6StGMWt8XT7ySvKPj8JsRUU_Nb3qdhGb8P7sGQOELD48IgZRcO-uKrjszZuc%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2608e450aef641529305966ae44351ce&_e=Uza9rJwhrILRbRSa9IRgxbWRY6J-YMIMZ48E-suCyR3BE9x2TDdBg_Ej_UBThZ3LLUNXnF6TtQGoy1_xT8neGzhiEATPK--rpmkxFIuOyBdy-Rm37uvqe2BoLSNst7q8bJnj0nZhIIHNcQNKfnhS6-HE4lAVGo_DnGbx6jiLovZBNZ5FJUzVPLtD58WK3oBGdtcNpnVb5NE4J2uhIj9N0Ioo5rpBNeUzvoo0jF9qRqtKqhG3IIZkodXTVtFyCotdht_bsgvPzGW6ep65oZHYJ7kDiZCS7NBtjq95NeIQTSc8GLc9r2lnF-gzjTjjEauoxzDbaJeoXaPi_v5irvSMHA2lIXKnNOqPE4N2qqSLtAn3iUcqeFTeYpGV0WhpPWqRcMp9m76Ns8oHcL6ephu6FAXJJWuW38tPuEoJCz6TpvQ%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2608e450aef641529305966ae44351ce&_e=Uza9rJwhrILRbRSa9IRgxbWRY6J-YMIMZ48E-suCyR3BE9x2TDdBg_Ej_UBThZ3LLUNXnF6TtQGoy1_xT8neGzhiEATPK--rpmkxFIuOyBdy-Rm37uvqe2BoLSNst7q8bJnj0nZhIIHNcQNKfnhS6-HE4lAVGo_DnGbx6jiLovZBNZ5FJUzVPLtD58WK3oBGdtcNpnVb5NE4J2uhIj9N0Ioo5rpBNeUzvoo0jF9qRqtKqhG3IIZkodXTVtFyCotdht_bsgvPzGW6ep65oZHYJznCsiUSs2Qx5b1PAOTPNbUv0KKgxG3ewJdk-GrZHtvTxn8ucNkyCynjcZBFwJedL-0P8FkCmxRo_YAyZE_bRTVkqaACFd594SGYmG1QlYku9ALZQDXdEnrEpiTJe_4uxDdUUuXcN4E1Pgav4B3IVgM%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Pramila Jayapal HQ
subject: Sign the petition: Support the LIFT the BAR Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
If we want to be a country that leads with compassion, love, and unity — we need to start by removing harmful barriers to benefits for immigrants.
#
Peter,
If we want to be a country that leads with compassion, love, and unity — **we need to start by removing harmful barriers to benefits for immigrants.**
Pramila's Lifting Immigrant Families Through Benefits Access Restoration Act (LIFT the BAR Act) will finally eliminate the arbitrary and cruel five-year waiting period for access to critical resources like Medicaid, the Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP), and much more.
[**If you stand with Pramila and believe we must treat immigrants with the respect they deserve, please add your name in support of the LIFT the BAR Act today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/lift-the-bar-act-petition/?source=em20230702-2664&t=1&akid=2664%2E420207%2E5juHqQ)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/lift-the-bar-act-petition/?source=em20230702-2664&t=2&akid=2664%2E420207%2E5juHqQ)**
As an immigrant who came to this country alone at 16, Pramila knows the importance of passing this bill to finally eliminate xenophobic, and unreasonable barriers to health care, food assistance, and other life changing benefits. Immigrants and families should not have to wait to access basic, life-saving services.
In 1996, Congress passed restrictive legislation that created an arbitrary five-year waiting period for immigrants with lawful status to access crucial benefits and services. During this time, immigrants are significantly more likely to be uninsured, placing them at higher risk for adverse health and financial consequences.
To put this into numbers, in 2024, non-elderly immigrants will account for an estimated 8 percent of the population. **Yet they will have made up nearly 31 percent of the non-elderly uninsured population.**
**Every year, this arbitrary barrier denies millions of families, especially families of color, the basics that every family should have.** All of us, regardless of our immigration status should have this access. [**If you stand with Pramila and our movement, please add your name to support the LIFT the BAR Act and work to finally end this 25 year reign of injustice towards immigrants.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/lift-the-bar-act-petition/?source=em20230702-2664&t=3&akid=2664%2E420207%2E5juHqQ)
Together,
Pramila Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230702-2664-footer&t=4&refcode2=2664_420207_5juHqQ&akid=2664%2E420207%2E5juHqQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2664%2E420207%2E5juHqQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2664%2E420207%2E5juHqQ)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

clean_body: I’m eager to see what the following months hold for our campaign, and I’m so grateful for your support along the way. | = | Peter, My team and I spoke a lot last month about the importance of reaching our FEC fundraising goal. Hitting our quarterly marks sets our campaign up for success, and I’m proud to announce that because of your commitment, we reached ours! Hitting our goals is even more critical in the face of intense outside Republican spending. National Republican groups are already investing tens of thousands to unseat me, but if we keep up the momentum we’ve already built, I know we will defend this seat. I’m eager to see what the following months hold for our campaign, and I’m so grateful for your support along the way. With sincere appreciation, Abigail | = * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a17221c369c04a0194bff2062145d93a&_e=9nOwOgTeDYZtqvrHYpCI86vzLiu3KneZw_dCIBZcGmbuJhgl_oK0Ydx50i46Khu4nENGKE-rPzhgH9vvfZUdjQZLjHvmX5VjTP4gatkcmMEwMUZN3qaopYry_Ahl5wvcB2tVbIhl89aMZavhzEaf7BhMRgPNNzKKsf0Hw1EsOdZtejm5ZAPdk2UtmP6iy1FsOv6iltPkpQ5l0NXmsEL4iicr0OgH6yOos9wLz7z6xi_v5BPBVIcu4EXv6QuaIzziY41jbRI2QIj1jo5ncw7hUFaot_k0leF_ZKairEGhRv7C3O2eZXcE-4yUCcRMJKTOLAxO0XwrYsDg6OiPd4OI2dqnybCuWBkWA9IDYj3D5_jLCmQO5JyuTMRBAJbQBOCtYyYDNkWXJxCRicQGPjK4J4MGJYJdGIHts2uVaqw2cQI%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a17221c369c04a0194bff2062145d93a&_e=9nOwOgTeDYZtqvrHYpCI86vzLiu3KneZw_dCIBZcGmbuJhgl_oK0Ydx50i46Khu4nENGKE-rPzhgH9vvfZUdjQZLjHvmX5VjTP4gatkcmMEwMUZN3qaopYry_Ahl5wvcB2tVbIhl89aMZavhzEaf7BhMRgPNNzKKsf0Hw1EsOdZtejm5ZAPdk2UtmP6iy1FsOv6iltPkpQ5l0NXmsEL4iicr0OgH6yOos9wLz7z6xi_v5BPBVIcu4EXv6QuaIzziiJ9sNGcTcfbQTaAqBQnbl3RlH_icJTQcfckKNPUYpcnuAYQpCjbvDVV45h1-eIRvfoMLFBZTxfJBgAIlYVge6CWk4fIPFlaJdDjHhXUwvPLV29xJ7knsE0yfj3V0IVlwS7u3qnrNXmghgjzdJByDCRfe_K04YIDVIsDaTXB6MXM%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a17221c369c04a0194bff2062145d93a&_e=9nOwOgTeDYZtqvrHYpCI86vzLiu3KneZw_dCIBZcGmbuJhgl_oK0Ydx50i46Khu4nENGKE-rPzhgH9vvfZUdjQZLjHvmX5VjTP4gatkcmMEwMUZN3qaopYry_Ahl5wvcB2tVbIhl89aMZavhzEaf7BhMRgPNNzKKsf0Hw1EsOdZtejm5ZAPdk2UtmP6iy1FsOv6iltPkpQ5l0NXmsEL4iicr0OgH6yOos9wLz7z6xi_v5BPBVIcu4EXv6QuaIzzigFhfVIOU_Ah7kzBHjvWzqPHRgkv8th5HTKbvSP4kacER54J2SMY4rqBw5dpZHH1jRHBXhZuKJoYaW2FCr-YcVJqrMVVLwKcCPBkQ0XK7VBy1pYjNbwIVakdwVfeG_CVrI_E9D4tu443-PAghv32n6DIyDj1vLqp-g0sNrZstDjA%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=a17221c369c04a0194bff2062145d93a&_t=RTimfJiXEi4mggxXNLSmRWp8J4VggbwBmt4SuifrgKBQ8zseo1WxIoRRlOBbr9yfhfSUMw9e2CJ1SdavYD2I6ipA4RibJclVgJdB7tXJCgiolJ5ucNjwD_vpFs-krPuhXRg_nstg_csqksYs4jHg06j7Fg7Pmxe8j1Okxec41Sc%3D)

body:

\-----Forwarded message-----
Sender: **Joe Biden**
Date: Sat, July 1, 20203
Subject: Thank you, Peter
Peter, it means the world to me to have you by my side in this fight.
Because of you, we reached our fundraising goal last night and closed out our first quarter of this campaign in the strongest position possible.
**So I wanted to reach out personally and thank you for your support. This campaign wouldn’t be the same without you.**
Together, we’re going to keep moving our country forward.
We’re going to keep creating an America where our economy is built from the bottom up and the middle out, so that _everyone_ has a chance to get ahead.
Where everyone can get good health care, instead of worrying about going back to the days when you could be denied coverage because of a preexisting condition.
Where we ban assault weapons, so that our children and grandchildren can go to school without fear that they won’t make it home.
We’re still in a battle for the soul of this nation, Peter. But I know that when we win this race -- and I do believe that we will win -- it will be because of folks like you, who put in the work to build this campaign from the very beginning.
Thank you for being a part of this team, Peter.
Joe
Joe Biden

clean_body: On behalf of our whole team, thank you for your support. | | | I wanted to make sure you saw President Biden’s message, Peter. On behalf of our whole team,thank you for your support and for helping us reach our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal of this campaign. You can read more below from President Biden about what this campaign means to him, and about why your support is critical, especially right now. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks, Julie Julie Chavez Rodriguez Campaign Manager Biden-Harris 2024 \-----Forwarded message----- Sender: Joe Biden Date: Sat, July 1, 20203 Subject: Thank you, Peter Peter, it means the world to me to have you by my side in this fight. Because of you, we reached our fundraising goal last night and closed out our first quarter of this campaign in the strongest position possible. So I wanted to reach out personally and thank you for your support. This campaign wouldn’t be the same without you. Together, we’re going to keep moving our country forward. We’re going to keep creating an America where our economy is built from the bottom up and the middle out, so that everyone has a chance to get ahead. Where everyone can get good health care, instead of worrying about going back to the days when you could be denied coverage because of a preexisting condition. Where we ban assault weapons, so that our children and grandchildren can go to school without fear that they won’t make it home. We’re still in a battle for the soul of this nation, Peter. But I know that when we win this race -- and I do believe that we will win -- it will be because of folks like you, who put in the work to build this campaign from the very beginning. Thank you for being a part of this team, Peter. Joe Joe Biden | |

name: Al Franken
subject: a big announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48949?t=6&akid=8926%2E878179%2EOK2alH) Hey, it’s Al Franken.

[**I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Voter Protection Project and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48949?t=7&akid=8926%2E878179%2EOK2alH)

Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that _funded the police!_ Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

**_Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them._**

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation.

[**So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Voter Protection Project and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48949?t=8&akid=8926%2E878179%2EOK2alH) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48950?t=9&akid=8926%2E878179%2EOK2alH)

clean_body: | Hey, it’s Al Franken. Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them. Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know. And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation. | | Tuesday marks **247** years since the United States declared independence. In that many years, we’ve still yet to achieve equal freedoms for all Americans — including through equal access to the ballot box. As we know, the ever-changing barriers to voting continue to be more severe for Black and brown folks.**So this Fourth of July, we’re thinking about the work ahead to push our nation towards a more honest and inclusive pursuit of freedom.** We each deserve the freedom to vote, the freedom to make choices about our own bodies, and the freedom to live authentically, without discrimination. As extremists continue to wage attacks on each of those freedoms as we speak, it’s clear that the road ahead will be long and steep — but Fair Fight Action is deeply committed to that fight for our democracy. We’re so grateful that you’re right there alongside us. Time and time again, we’ve seen that Americans can bring about change when we fight for it. Let’s keep fighting for our country and our government to truly live up to its potential, by protecting the sacred freedom to vote. | | We need you to speak out against this injustice. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65842665/414611960/-1258167442?sourceid=1050387&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjk2MDcwNi1lZDE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Ep6tZkvutQKkAwKg4B6wFZEHI7uS5K_LOuYcGZm4Go=&emci=dae2d10f-7517-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d2960706-ed18-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Just one week after the first anniversary of the _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization _decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade,_ the ultraconservative Supreme Court majority has ruled in favor of further undermining freedom and equality. **Make no mistake, Peter: These decisions are _exactly_ what Republicans were hoping for when they packed the Court with far-right justices.**

If you can, give our email from last Friday a read and join the wave of pro-choice activists across the country who are speaking out: **Do you approve of the Supreme Court?** **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65842666/414611961/-1258167442?sourceid=1050387&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjk2MDcwNi1lZDE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Ep6tZkvutQKkAwKg4B6wFZEHI7uS5K_LOuYcGZm4Go=&emci=dae2d10f-7517-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d2960706-ed18-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **| [**NO**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65842667/414611962/-1258167442?sourceid=1050387&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjk2MDcwNi1lZDE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Ep6tZkvutQKkAwKg4B6wFZEHI7uS5K_LOuYcGZm4Go=&emci=dae2d10f-7517-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d2960706-ed18-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Thank you,

the EMILYs List team _\----------Original Message---------
From: EMILYs List
Sent: Fri., June 30, 2022_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65842668/414611963/-1258167442?sourceid=1050387&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjk2MDcwNi1lZDE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Ep6tZkvutQKkAwKg4B6wFZEHI7uS5K_LOuYcGZm4Go=&emci=dae2d10f-7517-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d2960706-ed18-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **BREAKING: The Supreme Court just ruled against LGBTQ+ equality, affirmative action, and student loan forgiveness**

_We won't stand for this injustice — and we need 10,000 Democrats to join us in speaking out:_

**Do you approve of the Supreme Court?** **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65842669/414611964/-1258167442?sourceid=1050387&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjk2MDcwNi1lZDE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Ep6tZkvutQKkAwKg4B6wFZEHI7uS5K_LOuYcGZm4Go=&emci=dae2d10f-7517-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d2960706-ed18-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **| [**NO**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65842670/414611965/-1258167442?sourceid=1050387&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjk2MDcwNi1lZDE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Ep6tZkvutQKkAwKg4B6wFZEHI7uS5K_LOuYcGZm4Go=&emci=dae2d10f-7517-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d2960706-ed18-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter, the ultraconservative members of the Supreme Court have proven time and time again that they stand firmly against the American ideals of equality and justice for all.

It was just one year ago that the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ – a decision that ripped away reproductive choice for 22 million people. And in the past 24 hours, the Court's far-right conservatives have made horrific decisions that will:
* Strike down President Biden's **student loan forgiveness** plan.
* Make it easier for businesses to discriminate against **LGBTQ+ people**.
* Prevent universities from promoting **racial equality** in higher education.

Make no mistake: **These rulings are ripped from the pages of the Republican Party's playbook** — and their ultimate mission is to prevent LGBTQ+ people from living freely, stop any progress toward racial equality, and further burden working families.

We won't stand by and let the Republican Party and their handpicked Supreme Court justices drag our country backward. _**Please, join us in speaking out against the Supreme Court's decisions by responding to our poll:**_

**Do you approve of the Supreme Court?** **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65842671/414611966/-1258167442?sourceid=1050387&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjk2MDcwNi1lZDE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Ep6tZkvutQKkAwKg4B6wFZEHI7uS5K_LOuYcGZm4Go=&emci=dae2d10f-7517-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d2960706-ed18-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **| [**NO**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65842672/414611967/-1258167442?sourceid=1050387&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjk2MDcwNi1lZDE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Ep6tZkvutQKkAwKg4B6wFZEHI7uS5K_LOuYcGZm4Go=&emci=dae2d10f-7517-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d2960706-ed18-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Thank you for supporting the Democratic values of equality and justice for all. clean_body: | | | We need you to speak out against this injustice. Peter, Just one week after the first anniversary of the Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization decision to overturn Roe v. Wade, the ultraconservative Supreme Court majority has ruled in favor of further undermining freedom and equality. Make no mistake, Peter: These decisions are exactly what Republicans were hoping for when they packed the Court with far-right justices. If you can, give our email from last Friday a read and join the wave of pro-choice activists across the country who are speaking out: Do you approve of the Supreme Court? | Thank you, the EMILYs List team \----------Original Message--------- From: EMILYs List Sent: Fri., June 30, 2022 BREAKING: The Supreme Court just ruled against LGBTQ+ equality, affirmative action, and student loan forgiveness We won't stand for this injustice — and we need 10,000 Democrats to join us in speaking out: Do you approve of the Supreme Court? | Peter, the ultraconservative members of the Supreme Court have proven time and time again that they stand firmly against the American ideals of equality and justice for all. It was just one year ago that the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade – a decision that ripped away reproductive choice for 22 million people. And in the past 24 hours, the Court's far-right conservatives have made horrific decisions that will: Strike down President Biden's student loan forgiveness plan. Make it easier for businesses to discriminate against LGBTQ+ people. Prevent universities from promoting racial equality in higher education. Make no mistake: These rulings are ripped from the pages of the Republican Party's playbook — and their ultimate mission is to prevent LGBTQ+ people from living freely, stop any progress toward racial equality, and further burden working families. We won't stand by and let the Republican Party and their handpicked Supreme Court justices drag our country backward. Please, join us in speaking out against the Supreme Court's decisions by responding to our poll: Do you approve of the Supreme Court? **| Thank you for supporting the Democratic values of equality and justice for all. Together we will overcome our far-right opponents. Onward, the EMILYs List team | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: President Biden’s new path on student debt cancelation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The fact is, the extremists on the Supreme Court had to go out of their way to block student debt cancelation. There is still a path forward. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65860532/414643996/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15E_STU_E_20230702_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWNkNTBiZS0xMDE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTtzFbEdMx_y9Ab512QpqKuxMTV948hj4eaC5N5ARWE=&emci=5cc25f1a-1019-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d9cd50be-1019-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
I could go on, and on, and on about all the reasons why the extremist conservative majority on the Supreme Court made a deeply wrong decision on student debt cancelation. Or I could just quote Justice Elena Kagan’s dissent: **"In every respect, the Court today exceeds its proper, limited role in our Nation’s governance.”** “The result here is that the Court substitutes itself for Congress and the Executive Branch in making national policy about student-loan forgiveness." "Congress authorized the forgiveness plan (among many other actions); the Secretary put it in place; and the President would have been accountable for its success or failure." “The HEROES Act’s text settles the legality of the Secretary’s loan forgiveness plan. The statute provides the Secretary with broad authority to give emergency relief to student-loan borrowers...What the Secretary did fits comfortably within that delegation. But the Court forbids him to proceed." It’s clear: President Biden was well, well, well within his legal authority. The fact is, the extremists on the Supreme Court had to go out of their way to block student debt cancelation. And they only were able to because a bunch of Republican politicians sued to stop hard-working Americans from getting relief. But there is still a path forward. On Friday afternoon, President Biden announced a new path to provide student debt relief through the Higher Education Act. He is right to fight back on behalf of working people and the law is on his side. I’m staying in the fight to cancel student debt and fix our broken higher education system. No one should have to get crushed by debt for continuing their education after high school. In town hall after town hall, in selfie line after selfie line, in phone call after phone call, I’ve heard the stories of people who fought and scraped their way through their educations — because that’s what they were told to do their whole lives, to get a ticket to the middle class — only to get weighed down by debt. They whispered in my ear about how they just didn’t see a way they’d ever be able to pay it off. They need relief. And I’m going to keep working to ensure people get that relief. Stay tuned for more updates. And please take care of yourself. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65860534/414643997/65265856?refcode=EMZ15E_STU_E_20230702_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWNkNTBiZS0xMDE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTtzFbEdMx_y9Ab512QpqKuxMTV948hj4eaC5N5ARWE=)

We won’t take up too much of your Sunday, but we wanted to reach out to let you know that once again, our people-powered team showed its full strength. **Thanks to all of you, we hit our June goal before the deadline passed!**

We know you heard a lot from us over the past days, so we can’t thank you enough for sticking with us. The journey ahead won’t be easy, but if we continue to work together like we did last week, _we can accomplish anything._

Thanks for being on our team,

Deluzio HQ | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. Thanks to all of you, we hit our June goal before the deadline passed! We know you heard a lot from us over the past days, so we can’t thank you enough for sticking with us. The journey ahead won’t be easy, but if we continue to work together like we did last week, we can accomplish anything. Thanks for being on our team, Deluzio HQ | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. He's a champion for our unions, and he's fighting to guarantee good healthcare for every American, taking on corporate power, and advocating for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. = | = = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: People power vs. special interests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Lobbyists are buying YouTube ads just to target politicians.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230702-4570-header&t=1&akid=4570%2E2526796%2EAJQH5M)
We’ve seen firsthand that lobbyists will go to some pretty extreme lengths to influence elected officials.
[Alexandria is one of only a few politicians who refuse all campaign contributions from lobbyists and corporations. We rely entirely on you, so if you can, please donate today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230702.Y7xzLF&refcode=em20230702-4570-P_FND_EGR_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4570%2E2526796%2EAJQH5M)
**[Contribute →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230702.Y7xzLF&refcode=em20230702-4570-P_FND_EGR_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4570%2E2526796%2EAJQH5M)**
Lobbyists regularly identify legislation they need to kill to keep profits high — no matter the human cost — and come up with “sensible” talking points to call policy “misguided.” Then, they schmooze policymakers into accepting them.
Alexandria is fighting to loosen the grip of special interests on Washington by regulating the amount of money that elected officials can receive from corporations, special interests, and dark money PAC’s.
She starts by taking no meetings with corporate lobbyists or picking up the phone to dial for dollars. **100% of Alexandria’s time is focused on you and our future.**
That’s how people power changes our nation.
[Will you make a contribution today so Alexandria can continue to work against special interests that spend millions of dollars influencing politicians so they can make record profits at the expense of everyday people?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230702.Y7xzLF&refcode=em20230702-4570-P_FND_EGR_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4570%2E2526796%2EAJQH5M)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230702.Y7xzLF&refcode=em20230702-4570-P_FND_EGR_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=4570%2E2526796%2EAJQH5M)**
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230702?refcode=em20230702-4570-P_FND_EGR_TWT&t=24&refcode2=4570_2526796_AJQH5M&akid=4570%2E2526796%2EAJQH5M)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230702-4570-P_FND_EGR_TWT&t=25&akid=4570%2E2526796%2EAJQH5M)**

Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskUGvlDAQxz_NcIOUKaXsgcNTgolGjSbvGU8v3XbY7W4LWIYY_PQGsnowXn_zm_lPZkycgx-2FvQbQLx6twAiyCdAXFm-mOfnj2nLg_6Rv1MveNmL-BYQeZvpr_kYUlA0PuxUd5lrKzTlYDNqy7ppZCm1Utm1RW1OTluhlNa2Ec41YkAqz0KWWkmlMt-iQCm0wLIWiKfipLWrG6krIjdYIqjEEVQMiYivfrxTcsaHrbBTzEJ7ZZ6XY7EesF_IrokKM5KbeDcA--DPlHjLL6tJDrC_mUhLPt2JBsoNs7H3PJ7zKYLsV46vy7QmSyC7_4iA9a5Ecn6NILs94CDWxNn4ywiyi-cHY0q7M7CrAGsTp3VkkB2qPz3TyHSg0Yb80w0_8M1--2oB69cxeAey-wceH5Pdry-Knz6__56l1s0_fQh-qTVU4nIcyk7xdwAAAP__87abMA)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskc-O1DAMh5_GvbVKnbaZOfSwUIqEhIDDLuK0yh9nJjtJU9IU1H161GrggPb6-bN_li3D7J3dehDvAPHqzAKIwB8Acc38ST4-fk5b6cXP8mP7hJe9iO8BMW8z_TPvQyoK0vmdiqEwfYOytrqgvu5OJ15z0bbFtW8YMmWacy2ZYkxbjbXWVjGl6rY56bZwPTLkTDCsO4Z4rs5CmO7ERUNkrCaChh1BlU1E-eqmGyUjnd8qHUPh-2vO83IsNgKOC-k1USUnMjHvBuDonaKUt_KyymQAxxcZaCnjjchSKXOW-lYGVcYAfFxzeF7imjQBH94QAbtdCWTcGoAPe8BBtAyzdJcJ-BDUnWVKu2OzaQA7GeI6ZeADtn974pTpQJP2Zffh5fXXV6GX74Dd8-SdAT78B4-P8eH1W5sfvnz6UaTezL-d927pBDTschxKx_AnAAD__wXXnAU)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3EDgQJI9cNgWUalSVfWwI_W0MokZ0kmAhqCKPn0F2vZQ7fXzZ_-WTWH1bjxaUB8AcXJ2A0QQz4C4J3Gjl5cv8ci9-pl_am54P4v4ERDTsfI_821IwYGcP6nqMtvWSNVoMm4rqbWohGqabGqHQZWDrDVTKbUZamsrzXpsUJLRg24y12KJolQlVrJEfCqelLJSC1Uz29EwQ11eQcUYmdPk5gdHS84fhVlC5tsppXW7FusB-43NHrmgme2STgOw927gmI78vlO0gP0PCrzly4N55JxSIvPIw5AvAUS_p_C6LXs0DKJ7RwSUpxLYuj2A6M6AixgKK7n7DKILwxtLHE9nTLYGlBSWfU4gOmz-9ixz4gvNxufTwERb3dw0oHydvbMguv_g9THR_f7WpOevn79nsbXrL-e926SCurxfhzJL-BMAAP__PYOb2Q)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Friend, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskcGO1DAMhp_GvbVqnTZpDz0MlCIhIeCwK3FaZRJnJkzSlDTRqjw9arVwQFw_f_Zv2dKvzpp9BPEOEO9Wb4AI7AKIObFn-fT0Oe6lEz_Lj90z3o4ivgfEtK_013wbUpGX1h1UTIUeW5SNUQWNDe971jDRdcV9FFwMbW1qGnSvu84g9mpgTSNIU9s3TWFHrJHVosaG14hDNQihec9ES6SNIoK2PoMqE4nS3S4Pilpat1cq-MKN95TW7VxsBpw3UjlSJRfSIR0G4OzslWLay1uWUQPOP6SnrQwPIkOlTEmqR-mvZfDA5pz8yxZyVARs-o8IyA_Fk7bZA5uOgJMo6VdpbwuwyV_fWKJ4OCbpFpBLH_KSgE3Y_ekJS6ITLcqVee-_4oftdbgA8pfFWQ1s-geeH2PTr29dunz59L2Io15frXN24wLa-nYeSgX_OwAA___2Dpri)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3EDgQAIHDtNSKq20qnrYlfa0Mokzk04CFIIq-vQVaNpDtdfPn_1bNoXZO7u3oD4B4s2ZFRBBXABxi-KVXl6elz316mf6tXrF61HEz4AY95n_mY8hGQdy_qCqS0xbIhVWJ9wWsq5FIVRVJbdWNdQYo4u6sja3SNVQ1qaUWlJjJWGTuBZzFLnKsZA5YpM1ShlZC1UyG6uZoczPoMwuzPHmxjsvhpzfMz2FxLe3GOf1XKwH7FfW28IZjWymeBiAvXcDL3FPrxstBrD_QYHXdLozW04pRtL3NAzpFED0Wwzv67QtmkF0H4iA8lACG7cFEN0RcBJNYSZ3HUF0YXiwyMvh2GhKQElh2sYIosPqb880Rj7RqH361n95HiyNTxdA-T56Z0B0_8HzY6L7_b2Kl29Pb8nSmvmX896tUkGZX89D6Sn8CQAA__9HaZvV)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Friend, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskUGPnDwMhn-NuYGCDYQ9cNjvQ1RaqapW7Y7U0yokzkw6CdAQWrG_vgJte6h6ffzYr2WrsHhn9w7kf4B4c2YFRKBHQNwSXdTLy8e4515-zz_UF7weRfwfENO-8B_zfUjBQTl_UNlnpqtQlVZn3JVN21JJsq6zW0cVSyukoFbI0ZS1aZvRahqF1lTiaDPXoUASUmDZCMSH4kFK07QkK2ZjNTNU4gwqbGRONzfdORrl_F7oOWS-u6W0rOdiA-Cwst4iF2piM6fDABy8GzmmPb9uKhrA4ZsKvObzndlyrlJS-p6HMZ8D0LCl8LrOW9QM1P9DBGwOJbBxWwDqj4CTaBUW5a4TUB_Gd5Y4Ho5NpgJsVJi3KQH1WP_umafEJ5q0zy9f9PNTtf34_AbYvE7eGaD-L3h-jPq35zo9fnr6msXOLD-d925tJFTieh5Kz-FXAAAA___rWJwH)**.

clean_body: 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | | | Dear Friend, Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have. In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me. It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and no one to stop me. Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned. Those 14 years were formative. When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle. I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership. Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. And leadership has a price.” I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded. In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me. And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up that will quickly pile up. As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that the cost will exceed $500,000. Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep. No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me. That’s where you come in. ? When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting! A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced. Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer. But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming. Friend, . And I’ll commit to you that I will NOT let you down. So please, . We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can. Friend, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . and we cannot stop now! Respectfully, James O’Keefe P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, .

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We hate to say it, friend, but we missed our goal and we need your help to make it right
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | | **This could be a DISASTER, friend****. We were counting on hitting our goal by yesterday’s deadline,** but we fell seriously short. Now we urgently need your help to close the gap before it’s too late.
---
Here’s why your matched gift matters so much today: Vulnerable species are depending on Friends of the Earth to protect them from certain EXTINCTION and defend the habitats they call home and our planet from Big Polluters. Any gap in our budget means we have to scale back our fight while greedy corporations ramp up their planet-killing destruction for the sake of profits. We can’t let that happen.
With so much at stake, our generous donors agreed to **EXTEND this once-a-year match opportunity for ONE MORE DAY.** So we had to pull your supporter record while there’s still time to DOUBLE your impact for our planet.
| | [ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858997?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MATCH STATUS:** **EXPIRING at 11:59 p.m.**
**END-OF-FISCAL-YEAR DONATION:** STILL PENDING
**DONORS NEEDED FROM your area:** **5**
---
| | [DOUBLE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858997?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. Match extension expires at 11:59 p.m._
---
To be honest, friend, we’re really worried. **We set our goal to hit $150,000 before our end-of-fiscal-year deadline because that’s the MINIMUM we need to stand up to Big Polluters.** There’s no fluff in our budget, just the dollars and cents it takes to show up and fight when ecosystems are under attack. ** If we fall short, that fight gets infinitely harder – and we feel the impact in poisoned waterways, toxic farmland, and the growing absence of endangered species. **
That’s not the world we want to live in. We can’t afford it, and neither can the precious species counting on us to do the right thing. **That’s why this match extension is such a critical opportunity to help protect the planet we all share. But we only have until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT to make up our fundraising shortfall, and we’re relying on activists like you who know how much is at stake. **
[**Please: Rush your $27 membership gift now before our rare match EXTENSION expires at midnight tonight, and every dollar will be doubled – up to $150,000 – to power the fight for our only Earth!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858998?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

name: Allyson Damikolas
subject: Thank YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Allyson for Congress
body:
Friends,

Hope you’re all having a fabulous long weekend.

I just wanted to say thank you for your help and support these past weeks.

I’ve received hundreds of donations from so many of you. It’s helping my campaign accelerate our efforts and reach out to more voters.

I sincerely mean this: none of my campaign’s success so far would have been possible without your consistent help and support.

Have a great long weekend and Happy Fourth of July!

Let’s keep standing up and standing together for our country so that we can, in fact, strive towards a more perfect union.

— Allyson

name: Senator Deb Fischer
subject: Here we go…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
As the senior senator from Nebraska, I’ve constantly stood up to the dangerous, damaging efforts by Joe Biden and Democrats in the U.S. Senate who have counted on their razor-thin Senate majority to push a host of bad policies through Congress -- runaway taxes and spending, trillions in new debt, record inflation and energy costs, weaponized federal bureaucracies, open borders invasion, foreign policy fiascos, and chaos abroad. The disastrous leftist agenda the **Biden-Schumer Democrats** continue to inflict on our great country must be stopped -- and reversed. That opportunity is rapidly approaching with the **2024 Elections** , Peter, [**and that’s why I’m contacting you today.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=5ab2cf7423e24948b47378bfb8a06616&_e=C5hUMpwMJ01i3_IELAco-1p4TpSq0SwmM9lZ6OsG3lIXy36Gbv97D89Jv0WUmJVgYqeg2X0RQDcp0aNv4quOYesywbPBbXj0DsMwPdLwsxf0MqP8GWU8N7KC81so4nXKy76TtIiDxBHmJo6YE5rXvAW6p7lOwxLOSbXH3zgUUEpwaJXtGCFjmdQjLB1BeX8PC7TnX9u9_qi21xJ3t6Of7FuKu_cOHxUk3MhNIQPQXbKO-1Fn_5xRpJGxrkJKpDzghCy2J6-nkyRscX6bDCZdQELb6Evp7o2xHo04rYXbfQG-QtmAHFcQ9gc-KzGeQ3essMtVkkaJolVcvkbxGQ7bU1PKFYNrCYK0D9BQx_m40EA%3D) To end the Democrats’ schemes -- and begin repairing the damage they’ve inflicted with commonsense conservative solutions -- we need strong Republican Senators who can win on Election Day _and_ follow through with the experience and capability necessary to get things done on Capitol Hill.
