Friends, I wanted to reach out after the devastating rulings last week from the MAGA Supreme Court. There is **incredible hypocrisy** in justices who accept extravagant gifts denying aid to Americans who are desperate for student loan debt relief. There is **deep inequity** in striking down Affirmative Action when it helps level the playing field in the college admissions process. There is **gross prejudice** in allowing business owners to discriminate against LGBTQ+ Americans. I promise I will fight every day in the Senate to counter the wrongdoing of this court that is largely the result of a dangerous, one-term president. In the meantime, it’s important to know how these decisions affect you. **[That’s why I’m reaching out with my team’s July Priorities Survey. Will you take a moment to share your thoughts and any other priorities on your mind? It’s important to know what issues matter to you most, especially now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65845603/414624430/-835793812?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230702_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmYyZjQwNy1mODE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=13myeKq1c25DG7ns17CP3Ffao6q9pCogOwVYxBV6kQI=&emci=aff2f407-f818-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b2f2f407-f818-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65845604/414624431/-835793812?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230702_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmYyZjQwNy1mODE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=13myeKq1c25DG7ns17CP3Ffao6q9pCogOwVYxBV6kQI=&emci=aff2f407-f818-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b2f2f407-f818-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

clean_body: Take a minute to fill out our July Priorities survey >> Friends, I wanted to reach out after the devastating rulings last week from the MAGA Supreme Court. There is incredible hypocrisy in justices who accept extravagant gifts denying aid to Americans who are desperate for student loan debt relief. There is deep inequity in striking down Affirmative Action when it helps level the playing field in the college admissions process. There is gross prejudice in allowing business owners to discriminate against LGBTQ+ Americans. I promise I will fight every day in the Senate to counter the wrongdoing of this court that is largely the result of a dangerous, one-term president. name: Urgent Redistricting Update
subject: What Alabama’s July 21 deadline means for the 2024 election >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Let us catch you up to speed on the latest redistricting news, team. → **Last month** , the U.S. Supreme Court struck down Alabama’s congressional maps, ruling that the maps violated the Voting Rights Act by illegally diluting Black voting power.

→ **Now, Alabama has until July 21** to enact a new map that includes an additional majority-Black district. **This will mark the first time that Black Alabamans have majority representation in more than one congressional district in nearly 150 years.**

→ **And that’s not all.** According to experts, the Court’s reasoning regarding Alabama’s maps may apply to ongoing litigation in states like South Carolina, and Georgia. Depending on the outcome of those cases, more states could be required to draw new, fair maps before the next election.

→ **Here’s why it matters:** Last November, control of the House majority was decided by just five districts. That means overturning gerrymandered maps – even in just a handful of states – will have _major_ implications for the 2024 election. **New developments will be happening rapidly, so the NDRC’s fight for fair maps, voting rights, and a strong democracy has never been more important. Will you donate now to help us continue our critical work nationwide?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Let us catch you up to speed on the latest redistricting news, team. → Last month , the U.S. Supreme Court struck down Alabama’s congressional maps, ruling that the maps violated the Voting Rights Act by illegally diluting Black voting power. → Now, Alabama has until July 21 to enact a new map that includes an additional majority-Black district. This will mark the first time that Black Alabamans have majority representation in more than one congressional district in nearly 150 years. → And that’s not all. According to experts, the Court’s reasoning regarding Alabama’s maps may apply to ongoing litigation in states like South Carolina, and Georgia. Depending on the outcome of those cases, more states could be required to draw new, fair maps before the next election. → Here’s why it matters: Last November, control of the House majority was decided by just five districts. That means overturning gerrymandered maps – even in just a handful of states – will have major implications for the 2024 election. New developments will be happening rapidly, so the NDRC’s fight for fair maps, voting rights, and a strong democracy has never been more important. Will you donate now to help us continue our critical work nationwide? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We cannot emphasize enough that now is not the time to grow complacent, team. name: Jason Crow
subject: I'm hoping to hear directly from you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Happy July, folks —

I made a pledge during my first victory speech: As long as I have the honor of serving you in Congress, I will be there for you no matter what.

As a former Army Ranger, I’ve worked to bring servant leadership to the halls of Congress. My team and I are working to put the needs of our community ahead of partisanship and make this the most productive session yet.

As we’re entering the summer, I’m hoping to hear directly from you.

Will you complete my July Strategy Survey today? Here’s your personal survey link: [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-07-strategy-survey]

BEGIN THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-07-strategy-survey]

Thank you for entrusting me with your support. Together, we will usher a new generation of leadership to Congress. Onward!

— Jason

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-july-2023]
Jason Crow for Congress

Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States

| Hi there, I’m writing today to share exciting news about our campaign: thanks to supporters like you recognizing the importance of the FEC filing deadline, we surpassed our second-quarter fundraising goals. The second quarter of a non-election year is known for being a slow time for fundraising, but our team has always been one to exceed expectations. Thanks to your support, we can make early investments in campaign resources that will set us up for success in 2024 and beyond. Moreover, because we had such a solid second FEC report, I’ll be able to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time advocating for West Michiganders. Experts on both sides of the aisle already say this district will be a battleground in the fight for the House majority, so it means the world to me to know you have my back. Gratefully,
Hillary
---
| | _Hillary Scholten is a mom, attorney, and fourth-generation West Michigander representing MI-03 in the House of Representatives. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Trump attacked me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | **Friend – Donald Trump attacked me on Truth Social, calling me "one of the worst in the Senate!"** It's never been more clear: The GOP is doing everything it can to replace me with a Trump yes-man and flip the Senate red. To be clear, I'm not scared of their attacks. But I do know that where Trump goes GOP dark money follows – and if I'm being attacked this early in the race, we're in for a long, challenging and expensive road ahead. [**That's why I'm urgently asking for your grassroots support so I can fight back, friend: Will you rush $5 or more today -- split with Serve America -- to help me stand up to the GOP's attacks and protect Ohio's critical seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65847477/414631649/-2003341165?refcode=230702_SAP_Sherrod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmI2YjNjMS1mZTE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jna5JyiBA5G6xzeZt-kzb3XFIxsASqYP8R-liEZ12PI=) CNN analysts and FiveThirtyEight are calling me one of the most targeted senators on the ballot, and Politico analysts are reporting Ohio could decide Senate control. But I do know that where Trump goes GOP dark money follows – and if I'm being attacked this early in the race, we're in for a long, challenging and expensive road ahead. = CNN analysts and FiveThirtyEight are calling me one of the most targeted senators on the ballot, and Politico analysts are reporting Ohio could decide Senate control. The truth is: I can't win this battleground race and defend Ohio from right-wing attacks without your grassroots support. = Thanks for helping me fight back against the GOP attacks and protect this critical seat. | Peter,

I want to express my deepest gratitude to you for your invaluable support. Thanks to dedicated grassroots supporters like you who recognized the urgency of this moment, we not only achieved but surpassed our quarterly fundraising goal!

I can now devote less time to fundraising efforts and focus more on addressing the pressing issues that directly affect families across the greater Lehigh Valley and the United States. I am committed to our shared goals, including promoting good jobs, affordable healthcare, and robust infrastructure.

However, our work is far from complete. Republicans have already booked millions in ad spots to target me in an effort to flip my seat and replace me with a reliable vote for their extremist agenda in Congress.

The fight will only get tougher from here, so we must keep up our grassroots momentum to defend this toss-up seat and take back the House next November. clean_body: Our ability to block Gov. Youngkin’s far-right agenda and pass meaningful legislation hinges on electing strong Dems to lead the VA House. We only need to flip a few seats to retake control. | | | | | Did you see what’s happening in Virginia? Since taking office, Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin has created barriers to the ballot box, pushed an extreme abortion ban that threatens doctors with jail time, and proposed a budget that gives the ultra-wealthy massive tax handouts. It’s absurd! But there’s good news: This November, we have a chance to reclaim the Virginia House, defend our Senate majority, and deny Glenn Youngkin any opportunity to jam through his extreme agenda.The DLCC is the only Democratic party committee committed to getting it done, and our efforts are ramping up quickly. So we’re coming to you directly: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | It gets worse: Glenn Youngkin is so bad, he even refused to name a single policy difference with Donald Trump. Our ability to block Youngkin’s far-right agenda and pass meaningful progressive legislation hinges on electing strong Democrats to lead the Virginia House. We only need to flip five seats to retake control. Your contribution today could help put Democrats over the top. Early investments right now go much further than those made in the weeks and months leading up to Election Day. [#VeteranOfTheDay Army Veteran Alexander Henry Beville](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr54hgin56ukrtshbsc952n7v39hrgsfdgsu10eo_rp22sh2s8i66o70spj6aoj4cth238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1jmf832cuhnacbl69q37dtj65obac9k6jqq8cjlmjqq6t9hekp78ctlkgorac7k6eojacjlk2qj7cjkumh3acrkm6oradt24no)
Alexander Henry Beville was born in Waco, Texas, on February 12, 1920. He was the son of celebrated local dentist Dr. A. J. Beville and his wife Jennie, and attended Waco High School, graduating in 1937. Beville then attended Texas A&M; with his best friend from high school, Paul G. Haines, Jr., both were members of the class of 1941.

Peter, I wanted to send a quick note to thank you for your support for my campaign in July.

**I’m proud to run a grassroots campaign fueled by folks you chipping in what they can, when they can.**

Because of your support, I can continue the fight for affordable housing, economic justice, healthcare for all, student debt cancellation, reimagining the criminal justice system, and so much more.

But here’s the hard truth, Peter: **None of this is possible if we let the GOP maintain control of the House – _they’re already unraveling years of our hard-fought progress._**

[So we can’t lift our foot off the gas now, Peter. Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: | = Peter, We’re reaching out to ask if you can spare $1 to help us fund our work to elect more women. = Why are we asking for $1? $1 from each and every person reading this email will add up quickly, and it will give us the kind of grassroots momentum we need to elect more women and take back the House majority in 2024. $1 from you today might not seem like a lot compared to the billionaire mega-donors and shady super PACs Republicans have in their corner — but we are building a powerful grassroots movement we can be proud of (just $1 at a time)! Together, we are supporting leaders that look like us and the young people who need a seat at the table. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for extending your support! — HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Peter, Earlier this week, we faced our second FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year. **I'm excited to announce that thanks to the support of grassroots supporters like you, we reached our fundraising goal!** As one of the NRCC's top targets, Republicans will be looking closely at our fundraising numbers. And I'm sure they'll see our team has what it takes to defend this seat again in 2024. Reaching our end-of-quarter goal will ensure we're prepared to win next year, no matter what attacks they throw our way. We have a tough fight ahead, but with your support, I'm confident we'll be ready. Thank you, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. name: Andy Beshear
subject: I want to express my gratitude
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Thank you for all the support you have given to me. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65853027/414640644/950424521?refcode=em23_230702_eoqty_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230702_eoqty_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=f2b98da4-0a19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmI5OGRhNC0wYTE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OpXLY_D08N1AIhkrZtkN23hQ5zn0u6wF56weFJRU57Q=)
---
Peter,

As we close out the first full month of the general election, I want to take a moment to express my gratitude.

Our Commonwealth has made tremendous strides since 2019, and none of it would have been possible without the team I have here with me in Frankfort, working day in and day out to make life better for millions of Kentuckians.

But today, I want to especially thank you, Peter. On Friday, the financial quarter came to an end—for the first time during this general election. Thanks to supporters like you who stepped up in a huge way, we ended the quarter strong and are ready to head into the final few months of this campaign on solid footing.

Without the ongoing support of people like you, we would've never made it this far. I'm here to represent the people of Kentucky, and it's the hard work, tireless advocacy, and generous contributions of Kentuckians that elected me to this office.

So from the bottom of my heart — thank you. We're on an exciting path, and I hope to have your continued support as we near November.

Andy

clean_body: Thank you for all the support you have given to me. | = Peter, As we close out the first full month of the general election, I want to take a moment to express my gratitude. Our Commonwealth has made tremendous strides since 2019, and none of it would have been possible without the team I have here with me in Frankfort, working day in and day out to make life better for millions of Kentuckians. But today, I want to especially thank you, Peter. On Friday, the financial quarter came to an end—for the first time during this general election. Thanks to supporters like you who stepped up in a huge way, we ended the quarter strong and are ready to head into the final few months of this campaign on solid footing. Without the ongoing support of people like you, we would've never made it this far. I'm here to represent the people of Kentucky, and it's the hard work, tireless advocacy, and generous contributions of Kentuckians that elected me to this office. So from the bottom of my heart — thank you. We're on an exciting path, and I hope to have your continued support as we near November. Andy = | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I know it’s Sunday, but I wanted to share an exciting update about our end-of-quarter goal.
#
Hi Peter — I know it’s Sunday, but I wanted to reach out with a quick update.
**We’re still counting all the numbers, but it’s safe to say we beat our EOQ goal and had another record-breaking quarter.** My team and I will share more about that soon... but for now, I just wanted to say thank you.
Your support since I launched this campaign to replace Josh Hawley — whether you chipped in or just shared about our campaign with your family and friends — is helping us build the foundation for a powerful grassroots movement. And that’s the surest way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat and take back power for everyday Missourians next year.
**But we still have lots of work ahead of us.** From hiring staff to opening offices to getting our message in front of voters, your support this last quarter is what will make all that possible for our campaign over the coming months — and I am just so grateful for it.
Thank you again for helping us keep up this record-breaking momentum, Peter. I’m so glad to have you on this team and can’t wait to see what else we’ll accomplish together this year.
Now, let’s keep moving and flip this seat,
— Lucas Kunce

Hello,
Wow. The first few months of the campaign have been a whirlwind.
We hoped there would be excitement around my husband Adam Frisch’s campaign against Lauren Boebert, but the level of support has far exceeded our expectations. Thank you.
As the nation has already seen during this congressional term, Lauren Boebert has not changed her extreme approach – even after only winning reelection by just 546 votes and having the closest race in the country this past November. Adam, our family, and our campaign team are committed to finally kicking Boebert out of Congress.
Adam is already crisscrossing the district and meeting with voters and supporters. Our 17-year-old son, Felix, has enjoyed getting to go back out on the road with his dad, racking up the mileage on our pickup truck once again.
Our fundraising efforts are off to a great start, but in 2022, Boebert spent $2 million more than we did. As much as we wish politics didn’t come down to fundraising, it is critically important to introduce every last voter to Adam.
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to Adam’s campaign – whatever amount you can afford today – to help him defeat Lauren Boebert? Adam’s not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so he’s counting on the financial support of people like you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65854041/414641562/1610638071?refcode=em20230702pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=14d57a7a-0b19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGQ1N2E3YS0wYjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9UTbcmux9ryJAc46Aoot1U1gzjkySzBjP1rlctymBE=)

clean_body: We hoped there would be excitement around my husband Adam Frisch’s campaign against Lauren Boebert, but the level of support has far exceeded our expectations. Thank you. Hello, Wow. The first few months of the campaign have been a whirlwind. We hoped there would be excitement around my husband Adam Frisch’s campaign against Lauren Boebert, but the level of support has far exceeded our expectations. Thank you. As the nation has already seen during this congressional term, Lauren Boebert has not changed her extreme approach – even after only winning reelection by just 546 votes and having the closest race in the country this past November. Adam, our family, and our campaign team are committed to finally kicking Boebert out of Congress. Adam is already crisscrossing the district and meeting with voters and supporters. Our 17-year-old son, Felix, has enjoyed getting to go back out on the road with his dad, racking up the mileage on our pickup truck once again. Our fundraising efforts are off to a great start, but in 2022, Boebert spent $2 million more than we did. As much as we wish politics didn’t come down to fundraising, it is critically important to introduce every last voter to Adam. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your support and encouragement mean the world to Adam and our whole family. So, thank you again for continuing this journey with us. One of the greatest benefits of all this campaigning has been the opportunity to deepen existing friendships and make so many new ones. Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Katie Porter
subject: re: student loan forgiveness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We must reform the Court.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=25848%2E3422442%2EsD3YrJ)
Derek, I’m deeply disappointed in the Supreme Court’s decision to strike down Biden’s student loan forgiveness plan, but hopeful to see that this fight isn’t over.
Whether you went to college or not, whether you took out loans or not, whether you’re a Republican or a Democrat: **I’ve never met anyone who doesn’t want a stronger, more stable economy.** Canceling a portion of student loans is going to help us do that. **It will offer a massive boost to our nation’s entire economy.**
This isn’t just a “young person” issue. There are more than one million borrowers who are sixty or older—folks who took out loans to help their kids or grandkids, or who went back to school later in life. In fact, 70% of garnered Social Security goes towards student loan interest and fees (yes, interest and fees, not even the loan itself).
**This decision came as the final blow after a week of Supreme Court decisions turning back the clock on equality and threatening the strength of our economy.**
**This Supreme Court isn’t just conservative, it’s corrupt.** We should expand the court, enforce term limits, work to get politics out of our judicial system, and implement a judicial code of ethics.
This fight isn’t over: **[Can you add your name to my petition to show your support for student loan forgiveness?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kpem-student-loan-debt/?source=EMAJ02_1_SUP_20230702_V1_F&akid=25848%2E3422442%2EsD3YrJ)**
**[Add my name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kpem-student-loan-debt/?source=EMAJ02_1_SUP_20230702_V1_F&akid=25848%2E3422442%2EsD3YrJ)**
Onward,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ02_1_SUP_20230702_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=25848_3422442_sD3YrJ&akid=25848%2E3422442%2EsD3YrJ)**

Katie Porter for Senate

name: Petitions @ Team TNDP
subject: We can’t let them stop us from taking action on gun violence
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65862270/414644754/1802594825?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC15_20230702_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmEwM2EwOC0xMjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLJtd7c052qYrKahfIpW4_V4k0MVXMOtTkLymtf3btY=)
---
Peter — We have to keep the GOP accountable to their word. Back in April after the tragic Covenant School shooting, Governor Bill Lee broke from his party’s tradition and called for a special session to address gun violence incidents in Tennessee. But after pressure from the gun lobby and the GOP, Governor Lee has **YET** to issue a proclamation to put the special session on the legislative calendar. We can’t let another moment go by without taking action on gun violence. [**Peter — will you add your name right now and DEMAND that Governor Lee issue a proclamation to make the special session official?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65862273/414644755/1732353057?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC15_20230702_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmEwM2EwOC0xMjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLJtd7c052qYrKahfIpW4_V4k0MVXMOtTkLymtf3btY=&emci=58080ef4-6317-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=dba03a08-1219-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65862274/414644756/1732353057?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC15_20230702_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmEwM2EwOC0xMjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLJtd7c052qYrKahfIpW4_V4k0MVXMOtTkLymtf3btY=&emci=58080ef4-6317-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=dba03a08-1219-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)
---
We know they’ll use every tactic in the book to enact the will of the gun lobby who continues to bankroll GOP candidates from the top to the bottom of the ticket. They’ll drag their feet and then claim it’s too late to take action.
[**We’re sick and tired of thoughts and prayers, Tennesseans deserve better. Will you add your name today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65862275/414644757/1732353057?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC15_20230702_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmEwM2EwOC0xMjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLJtd7c052qYrKahfIpW4_V4k0MVXMOtTkLymtf3btY=&emci=58080ef4-6317-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=dba03a08-1219-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)

clean_body: | = Peter — We have to keep the GOP accountable to their word. Back in April after the tragic Covenant School shooting, Governor Bill Lee broke from his party’s tradition and called for a special session to address gun violence incidents in Tennessee. But after pressure from the gun lobby and the GOP, Governor Lee has YET to issue a proclamation to put the special session on the legislative calendar. We can’t let another moment go by without taking action on gun violence. | We know they’ll use every tactic in the book to enact the will of the gun lobby who continues to bankroll GOP candidates from the top to the bottom of the ticket. They’ll drag their feet and then claim it’s too late to take action. Thanks Peter, Tennessee Democratic Party Tennessee Democratic Party 4900 Centennial Blvd Suite 300 Nashville, TN 37209 United States | mailto:info@tndp.org | CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

body:
| | | Fellow American,

I have some troubling news:

In the first 24 hours of our end of quarter deadline extension, we didn’t raise enough to be on track to meet our goal.

_**And if we don’t pick up the pace before[TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT,](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=1e0974d2476d499399bb11c404db1f03&_e=XWVu2XOok73slJO7eGg6yFbJOjckMZ79pYvGgMuWtHszEaXGIPFkH-mpKoGzH9NIGXW0uYa1RkmcX_qEYCNmvlrdsHumFq3jfGVnVd3DUZq2O894Lbn9lmiu8soDGvqXtB0YZLgmEmeVimYvJu_ZsQnaTFMZeAj0thImnw0McyHBfgULg8uymoQSvIjvR4xf0FIWDE04BsmWlcbzIanepO1IoMx2HzsaCAfthi5rh5c31nQNkmVMbIWzhiCgZ9Qr5c2azG2lazjDU4Rg-_hiU10tgQV8tTy8kAUMC6-KAwaA7gR9gbyXgCqzWBFWUcIVchBzTT0Qb_enIrhQuKqAnntFf0z-z2Ntz1s_9to0_kguGuxtNCU4cPuX2tlaAg0dYxvW_s7lMNEtJeQwD-Y4nF3LdRQcIhCoW81HlWch7mw%3D) we’ll be _doomed._**_

The Left is prepared to spend MILLIONS to unseat me because I’m not afraid to tell the truth about their woke agenda.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: After this week of disastrous Supreme Court rulings, here’s my plan:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2834%2E5257348%2Ebb8SQQ ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, after this
week of disastrous rulings from the Supreme Court, it’s clear that our
highest Court is in desperate need of reform. And that starts with
expanding and unstacking the Supreme Court.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230702-expand-the-supreme-court-petition.2ZM42X&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_PET_AC90_20230702_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2834%2E5257348%2Ebb8SQQ ]Tweet from Adam reads: Expanding the size of the Supreme Court isn't extreme
or unprecedented — but the opinions of this Court certainly are

The Supreme Court is, by far, the most unrepresentative U.S. institution
in our government, yet it is also one of the most powerful.

I’ve spent years talking about the need to expand, unstack, and reform the
Supreme Court after Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell stacked it with
partisans. This week we saw firsthand the consequences of its imbalance.

In the four years following Mitch McConnell's refusal to even consider
President Obama’s 2016 nomination of Merrick Garland to the Court,
McConnell and Trump were able to push through three unpopular,
problematic, far-right nominees.

This has led to a 6-3, partisan and reactionary Court majority that just
this week has:

❌ Ended affirmative action

❌ Attacked LGBTQ+ rights

❌ Struck down President Biden’s student loan forgiveness plan

That’s on top of overturning Roe v. Wade, just last year.

All of these rulings are shocking and heartbreaking and negatively affect
countless Americans' lives — especially since SCOTUS is supposed to be an
impartial and nonpartisan legal body — but given the makeup of this
partisan Court, it’s also not surprising.

And with members of the Court enjoying lifelong appointments, we’re stuck
with their staunchly partisan, extreme agenda for generations to come
unless we act now.

Today’s Supreme Court is unfair, unjust, and no longer reflects what our
founding fathers intended it to be — instead it’s being used as a purely
partisan tool for Republicans to unilaterally reverse progress and strike
down our fundamental rights.

We must unpack the Court by expanding the number of justices on the Court,
instituting term limits, and enacting a code of ethics like every other
federal court. I’m proud to be sponsoring legislation in Congress that
will make these important reforms.

Congress must take action. It’s time we abolish the filibuster and unpack
the Court if we want any chance of restoring legitimacy and ensuring our
nation’s highest court doesn’t continue to be used to advance a partisan
agenda at odds with the interests of the American people.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230702-expand-the-supreme-court-petition.2ZM42X&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_PET_AC90_20230702_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2834%2E5257348%2Ebb8SQQ ]Derek, join
me in demanding Congress expand the Supreme Court by adding your name now.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230702-expand-the-supreme-court-petition.2ZM42X&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_PET_AC90_20230702_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2834%2E5257348%2Ebb8SQQ ]ADD YOUR NAME

I’m ready to continue this fight in the U.S. Senate and do whatever it
takes to ensure we have a more trustworthy Supreme Court.

Thank you for taking the time to read this and for taking action.

—Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=.zL8wZO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_PET_AC90_20230702_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2834%2E5257348%2Ebb8SQQ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=.RT6657&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_PET_AC90_20230702_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2834%2E5257348%2Ebb8SQQ ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=2834%2E5257348%2Ebb8SQQ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=2834%2E5257348%2Ebb8SQQ ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2834%2E5257348%2Ebb8SQQ

Friend, it’s Raul. I know you’ve had to endure a flooded inbox these last few days, but I just wanted to reach out and say **_thank you!_**

Your support, and the support of hundreds of grassroots supporters across our district (_and the country!_) has made a critical impact in the early days of our re-election campaign.

Whether you stepped up with a donation of $1, $5, or $100 – I can’t thank you enough, nor begin to explain the lasting impact you’ll have on this race.

Folks, this race will only get more challenging from here as we fend off relentless attacks from National Republicans aiming to undo all the progress we’ve made.

But today – and every day – I’m confident that their efforts to defeat our movement will fail. Not because of the partisan lean of our district, or because of any fundraising measure, **_but because of grassroots supporters like you._**

You’ve always had my back, friend, and for that I can’t thank you enough.

Onward!

clean_body: We would not be here without you | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Friend, it’s Raul. I know you’ve had to endure a flooded inbox these last few days, but I just wanted to reach out and say thank you! Your support, and the support of hundreds of grassroots supporters across our district (and the country!) has made a critical impact in the early days of our re-election campaign. Whether you stepped up with a donation of $1, $5, or $100 – I can’t thank you enough, nor begin to explain the lasting impact you’ll have on this race. Folks, this race will only get more challenging from here as we fend off relentless attacks from National Republicans aiming to undo all the progress we’ve made. But today – and every day – I’m confident that their efforts to defeat our movement will fail. Not because of the partisan lean of our district, or because of any fundraising measure, but because of grassroots supporters like you. You’ve always had my back, friend, and for that I can’t thank you enough. Onward! Dr. Raul Ruiz | | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. And with such a strong showing, I simply had to ask... ... How much higher can we continue to surge? name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: 3 helpless wolf pups, bloody and lifeless
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1859442?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Gray wolves lack critical Endangered Species Act protections -- which could push this vulnerable species closer to EXTINCTION. ** **CHOKED TO DEATH** in snares. **RAN OVER** by snowmobiles. **DYNAMITED** in their den while nursing their pups. Vulnerable gray wolves in Montana, Idaho, and Wyoming are facing some of the most _**brutal, inhumane hunting practices we’ve seen. **_ Baby wolves wait day in and day out for their mamas to come home, unaware of their **mangled bodies painting the forest floor red.** Pups are left to suffer from **STARVATION, HYPOTHERMIA,** or **PREDATION** without protection from their mothers. Yet trophy hunters are **actively fighting AGAINST PROTECTIONS** for these precious mammals! How long will we let ruthless trophy hunters brutalize America’s iconic wildlife? [**Friend, don’t let greedy private interests succeed in stripping away protections from helpless, vulnerable wolves. Add your name now before it’s too late!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1859443?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1859444?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Three BLOODY, LIFELESS carcasses have been found at the border of Wyoming -- _**believed to be the first wolf pups born in the Colorado wild in the past 80 years.**_ These helpless babies were protected by the state as a crucial part of the state’s repopulation efforts -- but as soon as they set their tiny paws across state lines, _**they didn’t stand a chance.**_
What’s worse -- in the past, the Biden Administration has gone so far as to file an appeal that could **REMOVE CRITICAL PROTECTIONS** for wolves! We can’t let this happen, Friend -- give the gift of your voice by ACTING NOW to STOP the Biden Administration from endangering helpless wolves even further!
Wolves are running out of time. [**Please, Friend, before it’s too late -- will you DEMAND the Biden Administration uphold protections for gray wolves and protect them from the brutal hunting tactics that are killing them in droves?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1859445?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1859444?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for taking action to protect wolves!
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Senator Sherrod Brown
subject: a GOP power grab, plain and simple
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
This could not be more urgent, friend: **C****orrupt GOP lawmakers in Ohio passed a bill through the state legislature that’ll make it harder for folks to have a voice in our democracy.** **I’m furious.**
This is a GOP power grab, plain and simple, designed to stop the organizers across Ohio who are fighting to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution.
We’ve seen pro-choice majorities succeed in other states when abortion access is on the ballot. Now it’s time for Ohioans to get that same chance to make their voices heard – without any new barriers in place.
**I’m working as hard as I can to fight back against this latest attack on reproductive rights, but I need to know you’re with me. Will you respond to my live poll now?**

clean_body: I wanted to send a quick note expressing my gratitude for all that you did for our campaign last quarter. | | | = Hi there – I wanted to send a quick note expressing my gratitude for all that you did for our campaign last quarter. With your support, we were able to surpass our Q2 fundraising goal, sending the message that our campaign’s strength shouldn’t be underestimated. We couldn’t have gotten through the finish line without each and every one of our grassroots supporters like you. I’m humbled and honored to know you have my back and believe in the movement we’ve built. While we get ready to celebrate the 4th and take a few days off, I’m hoping you’ll help me get a headstart on Q3. Our next deadline will be here before you know it, and we can only afford to go up from here. = Thank you so much. Wiley Nickel = Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. | | Friend,

---
When we won the White House and made history in 2016, we disrupted the status quo like never before._
_
---
_We turned a totally corrupt D.C. Swamp – full of warmongers and globalists who for decades profited off putting _YOU_ dead last – completely on its head. _

---
And from that moment on, we made more enemies in Washington than any political movement in HISTORY... _
_
---
We EXPOSED the rotten corruption of the establishment bureaucracy, and we restored YOUR government to its rightful place: _**the hands of THE PEOPLE.**_**_
_**
---
But our long list of enemies (the globalist special interests, left-wing billionaires, Marxist Democrats, RINO elitists, and Deep State thugs) decided that _never_ _again_ would they allow their power to be threatened.

---
**So, they tried to stamp us out, to DESTROY our beautiful movement by burying us in never-ending witch hunts... **

---
_**...By attempting to throw me in JAIL for _400 YEARS_ despite committing NO CRIME! **___
__
---
They’ve taken their hatred of our movement – and of me – to an extreme our country has never seen before. The Left has truly become a Third World tin-pot dictatorship.

---
But what these sick and twisted radicals don’t understand is that YOU, the American people, will NEVER go back to their status quo...

---
**...We will NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER our country to their tyranny. **

---
And despite their most vicious attacks and even the threats of IMPRISONMENT from Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ, our resolve to peacefully SAVE America only grows that much STRONGER.

---
**Which is why I have no doubt in my mind that in 2024, we _WILL_ win back the White House and cement a NEW status quo in our country.**

---
One where YOU – hardworking Americans – will never again be forgotten, and where YOUR VOICE is once again the most important in Washington.

---
Friend, all that I ask today, is that you help me PROVE just how many American patriots are standing with me in our mission to deliver this new status quo and save our country.

---
**[So please, if you’re not doing too poorly despite Crooked Joe’s disastrous policies, make a contribution of any amount today – _truly, even just $1_ – to stand with me in our fight to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=a2cc238a108c492e835dba9fdbc54c4d&_e=zOqE9JjEAsAuldCo2KxW0tLt4IygXEPtW3eyNXYuDks-YVEP0xJTRdPOSDWX_uH1_uoo_CsvgdspjosGpoHc9e1cAXvfYvBBUrUI5AKsfUlWt7mzaX-GINupGUbgJegIaLxxd1DdjqY5Tha48EzfZyOIXGfNrOqVlU6GhcchPVyNOGBasjIUj0xaVvYIEVgeDSZ7fZIatG5V7PHB7MatDf43c2kfpju3fsCq5ws87l6cbBYiVE81AK146i-7oXKOjs5LkiLq-TwkfTnAw6oh-SB_3nho5TTtp8Lgc-pxUJhHJhLf_ZwnHIc4Q_PKSTOYtrubQhwaIDMrjYqzFcHm9eXylJJw_7GQEhgCZoNJ7iKag8cpNanCOh3VpeyXoZJV3-pOvLQ0yXrpyUbzA-hMeT5teScf7u7P6OuRqydKb8I_OjhbPq16V0dWbImDvMQ2cBFw5VbkkNGQEpys7lHeZPbu5JvY0pLItl5fR6t3Ztg%3D)**

name: Chuck Grassley
subject: You need to hear this from me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
I have got to get this off my chest.

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=1dd42c3fa9a74803be98f193635d6908&_e=fN74igh7_P_q81vt8S0QONe21Rkn4kAM7qVNuC8UT97BtNhs4UogMDtu76Jjx0EYvX_UIDAflP-A0v6h90aooUuiKLeA9OvNAEkKPzRhXRM9A_Go8itYevt-seBi_fySWhrYP_sa5BpvuNEGskotE-hcY-qUZYyvbA0229jpx3Xjy4rrP1zYSV70kMGB8XXFC528eQzUDYj4QaF0x2mVqEk2SLBoju-NMc6NmxUnN2xW8smtl9pJrcGRIlvSglUgxUNaIfTz6NZRm97aUdSVxk9eMvDhVu4nkVGCx2vB3R8%3D)
---
Friend,

I hate to say this - but we missed our End of Quarter fundraising goal.

**This was one of the biggest pushes we 've had so far this year -- and it is troubling to tell you we missed it. We are SO CLOSE to being able to show the Democrats that we are READY for them in 2024.**

I wanted to let you know how close we are to reaching our goal. **In fact -- we are only $250 away...**

We can't leave the race so close to the finish line. With your support, we can hold our heads high this month, knowing that when the Democrats come after us, they'll run straight into **a solid wall of PATRIOTS ready to stop them from increasing their stranglehold on this nation.**

| | | **As we start a new fundraising quarter of 2023, Republicans need YOUR input.**

**No one knows what’s happening on the ground with everyday Americans more than you, and that’s why we want your advice and suggestions.**

**Our team put together a survey for our top patriots to give their input, and as one of the strongest members of our team, we want you to take a few minutes to fill it out.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Elder?=
subject: I’m Flying Over the Target
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=016f2fa1d1&e=0be619cbaa)
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=5d6669f1fe&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# I'm Flying Over The Target.
---
|
---
| | |
---
| America’s cities are no longer the envy of the world. Her city’s streets are crowded with hundreds of thousands of lost souls suffering from mental illness and drug addiction. Violent criminals are allowed to wreak havoc with impunity. Graffiti and trash sprout like weeds. But it doesn’t have to be this way. We should not and cannot accept the status quo. **I’m fighting back, and other Republicans are starting to join.**
---
|
* * *
6/25, Young Republicans 4th of July Bash, NYC
* * *
---
This month in Iowa, I [called for legislation](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=fe5dd4bce1&e=0be619cbaa) that would allow for the removal of prosecutors who refuse to prosecute criminals. In cities like New York, Philadelphia, Chicago, Los Angeles, and even Des Moines, prosecutors financed by radicals like George Soros intentionally sow chaos, allow violent criminals to roam free, and strike terror into law-abiding residents.
---
|
* * *
6/23 Red Arrow diner, Manchester NH
* * *
---
Evidently, I’m flying over the target. Soros-backed Polk County, Iowa “prosecutor” Kimberly Graham fired back at my proposal with an op-ed in the Des Moines Register attempting to portray herself as “tough on crime.” Nobody bought it. Everyone can see with their own eyes what’s happening to Democrat-run cities.
---
|
* * *
6/23 Porcfest- Lancaster NH
* * *
---
If it works in Des Moines, it can work in other states and cities, too. For now, Republicans can’t do much to fight the left in places like New York, Chicago, and LA. But in red states, Republicans must use their power to end the madness in blue cities. And I will help them. **I’m Larry Elder, and we’ve got a country to save.**
---

body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b2e642de18c94ce4a8fc6afa50d8b222&_e=WwvJKdQA00JdA2Q3rcswYst04bgxYgyQUrOEO6BsuZABfH3H2JsYFNbsTjoMV1ylTwJNUCO7YJl5hD1SbytLnzEmPBJHoI47ymY_p2rV3bq-fMiHZL27E84dAXqPdZksuDKdctdYjMtG7XEEUDv0elLJcKIrXVM5NiPRgeP7s8039o4ytsxVPRfNmkeBEMge5hyXsrAmpr27VebEjnV-qK7mAtvLJd_bJTocelLsE0ntOJTW0AU0UEbI1Gr0HKmHUx3pmcWD6eZooBfC_13vDRoZdarJAQ3jioFdQZldwbm17kdwe29BSdwpyM1TQCQQY6cDMWTtmC0d3UbkerAT6Ubrz1uMmYhgT8AhblJxpxxhCBVrgB42l6YmMaqBvc_npFdc5L7hfPc7dPpp-fBopA%3D%3D)

clean_body: This is serious. | | | | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend. Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again. Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6. I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. | So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. "If you chip in just $5 right now," I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? | | You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke | | | | Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic. "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY"** | Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS 704C EAST 13TH ST SUITE 260 WHITEFISH, MT 59937 https:///www.ryanzinke.com/privacy?recurring=true&utmcampaign=20230626OM-RR.108555t1356449-2081&extid=20230626OM-RR.108555t1356449-2081 Unsubscribe

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65868085/414659075/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTk3YTVjMi0zMjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k2p3At-vmSlll_6WpxBaMacow3uF0q3xOqH21qGl9Xc=&emci=6ae1e211-e218-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6a97a5c2-3219-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter—

My name is Pat Ryan, and I have the tremendous honor of representing New York’s Hudson Valley in Congress. I attended West Point (located here in my district!), where I learned the values of duty, honor, and country.

I first swore an oath to defend this country from all enemies — foreign and domestic — at West Point nearly 20 years ago. I fought to protect freedom abroad; now, I am fighting every day to protect it at home.

**For me, freedom isn’t a political bargaining chip or a cheap slogan.** It’s the guiding principle of our nation and a set of ideals I risked my life to defend.

Like a woman’s right to control her own body without government interference. Or a child’s right to go to school without the fear of being hit by a stray bullet. Or every American’s right to breathe clean air or to drink clean water.

[**_I’m fighting every single day to protect our freedoms in Congress, and today, I’m hoping you will chip in $15 to the Democratic Party of Georgia and my campaign so we can keep up the hard work to protect our freedoms._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65868086/414659076/-1985643937?refcode=20230702.1_PR_7B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTk3YTVjMi0zMjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k2p3At-vmSlll_6WpxBaMacow3uF0q3xOqH21qGl9Xc=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Last year, we proved pundits and pollsters wrong by winning a competitive special election in August that few thought a Democrat could win. Then, we proved them wrong again by winning a toss-up race in November. We did it because we pulled no punches, met voters where they were, and spoke plainly about the issues that matter. We spoke about freedom.

**Now, we need to win back the Democratic House majority, and there’s no place more important in that task than New York.** There are _six_ districts in New York held by Republicans that voted for Biden in 2020 — now, it’s mission-critical to flip these seats blue and hold onto my toss-up seat.

Your support now will set us up for success for years to come. Building a sustainable, high-performing campaign in New York and beyond takes a lot of resources, and early investment is important. That’s why I’m asking:

[**_Peter, can I count on you to pitch in to me and the Democratic Party of Georgia and keep up the good fight for freedom, for New York and Georgia, and for our country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65868093/414659083/-1985643937?refcode=20230702.1_PR_7B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTk3YTVjMi0zMjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k2p3At-vmSlll_6WpxBaMacow3uF0q3xOqH21qGl9Xc=)_

Yours in service,

Pat Ryan
